join_order.notes: Sequential scan of sub (86K rows). Collect rows where fy==2023 (~8.6K). Build open-addressing hash map adsh_code→name_code (cap=32768, ~256KB, fits in L1/L2). Also populate adsh membership bitset or hash set for fast rejection during num scan.

Use pre-built mmap index indexes/pre_is_hash.bin (4M slots x 16B = 64MB). Composite key hash(adsh_code, tag_code, ver_code) -> plabel_code. Zero build cost (P11). Simultaneously applies stmt='IS' filter and retrieves plabel_code for GROUP BY. Returns -1 if no matching IS row.

filters.technique: dict_code_compare: int16_t usd_code = find_code(uom_dict, 'USD') at runtime (C2)
skip rows where value is NaN/sentinel; apply after uom filter
direct int32_t compare on sub/fy.bin; sequential scan of 86K rows
pre-filtered implicitly via pre_is_hash index; no separate pre table scan needed

data_structures.fy2023_adsh_to_name: open_addressing_hash_map(cap=32768, key=int32_t adsh_code, val=int32_t name_code, 32B/slot, ~1MB, fits L2)
data_structures.thread_local_aggregation: open_addressing_hash_map per thread (cap=524288, key=(name_code int32_t, is_code int32_t, tag_code int32_t, plabel_code int32_t)=16B, val=(sum_cents int64_t, count int64_t)=16B, 32B/slot, 16MB/thread, 64 instances total)

phases.parallel_scan_num: #pragma omp parallel for schedule(dynamic, 65536) over 39.4M num rows; each thread owns local agg hash map; zero shared mutable state during scan
phases.merge: partitioned_merge: T x G = 64 x 186K = ~12M > 2M threshold; hash each local entry to P=64 partitions; each thread independently merges its assigned partition; fully parallel, zero contention

indexes.purpose: adsh_code -> sub_row lookup to retrieve name_code during num scan; layout: [uint32_t cap=262144][{int32_t adsh_code, uint32_t row_idx} x 262144]

composite join on (adsh,tag,version) with implicit stmt='IS' filter; returns plabel_code for GROUP BY key; layout: [uint32_t cap=4194304][{int32_t adsh,int32_t tag,int32_t ver,int32_t plabel} x 4194304]

key_columns: is_code (int32_t, constant='IS' but must be in key)
aggregation.key_note: C30 CRITICAL: ALL 4 GROUP BY dimensions must be in hash key. Missing any one dimension causes exact N-fold duplication of both sum and count.
aggregation.sum_accumulator: int64_t sum_cents; sum_cents += llround(num_value[i] * 100.0);  // C29 MANDATORY — no double, no float, no long double, no Kahan
aggregation.agg_cap_rationale: ~186K expected groups (8.6K fy2023 adsh codes x avg IS pre rows per adsh); cap = next_power_of_2(186000 * 2) = 524288 (C9, P23)
aggregation.merge_strategy: partitioned_merge (T x G ~ 12M > 2M threshold per aggregation-optimization skill)

output.topk_method: std::partial_sort or min-heap O(n log 200) after merge (P6)
output.decimal_output: printf("%lld.%02lld", sum_cents/100, llabs(sum_cents%100))  // C29: exact fixed-point output

decode.is_code: pre/stmt_dict.txt loaded at runtime -> always decodes to 'IS' (C2)

correctness_constraints: C2: Load usd_code=find_code(uom_dict,'USD') and is_code=find_code(stmt_dict,'IS') at runtime; NEVER hardcode dict codes
C9: AGG_CAP = next_power_of_2(estimated_groups * 2) = 524288; size per full group cardinality not per-thread share
C20: Use std::fill() not memset() for INT32_MIN sentinel initialization in any runtime-built hash tables
C24: All hash table probes use bounded for-loop (probe < cap), never unbounded while-loop
C29: MANDATORY int64_t cents accumulation via llround(v*100.0); NO double/float/long double/Kahan accumulator for SUM(value)
C30: GROUP BY hash key MUST include ALL 4 dimensions: name_code, is_code, tag_code, plabel_code; any missing dimension causes exact N-fold duplication of sum and count
